case_title: CREDIT BUREAU DATA SERVICE, DBA COLLECTION vs. MILES, RAYMOND et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDIT BUREAU DATA SERVICE, DBA COLLECTION DATA SERVICES-SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILES, RAYMOND MILES, RUBY L. $4,289.37 PRINCIPAL, $3,260.43 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,563.80, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #890759 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
